metadata.significance: Named after the people of Al-Hijr (Thamud), promises Quran's protection

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Aliflamra tilka ayatu alkitabi waquranin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an.
translations.en_yusufali: A. L. R. These are the Ayats of Revelation,- of a Qur'an that makes things clear.
translations.ms_basmeih: Alif, Laam, Raa'. Ini ialah ayat-ayat Kitab (yang lengkap sempurna) dan Al-Quran yang memberi penjelasan.

ayahs.arabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rubama yawaddu allatheena kafaroo law kanoo muslimeena

translations.en_sahih: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.
translations.en_yusufali: Again and again will those who disbelieve, wish that they had bowed (to Allah's will) in Islam.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ada masanya orang-orang yang kafir merasa ingin kalaulah mereka telah menjadi orang-orang Islam.

ayahs.arabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Tharhum yakuloo wayatamattaAAoo wayulhihimu alamalu fasawfa yaAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.
translations.en_yusufali: Leave them alone, to enjoy (the good things of this life) and to please themselves: let (false) hope amuse them: soon will knowledge (undeceive them).
translations.ms_basmeih: Biarkanlah mereka makan dan bersenang-lenang dengan kemewahan dunia dan dilalaikan oleh angan-angan (daripada bertaubat dan insaf); kemudian mereka akan mengetahui kelak (bencana perbuatan mereka).

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa walaha kitabun maAAloomun

translations.en_sahih: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.
translations.en_yusufali: Never did We destroy a population that had not a term decreed and assigned beforehand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiadalah Kami binasakan (penduduk) sesebuah negeri melainkan ada baginya tempoh yang tertentu dan termaklum.

ayahs.arabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalaha wama yastakhiroona

translations.en_sahih: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.
translations.en_yusufali: Neither can a people anticipate its term, nor delay it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesuatu umat itu tidak dapat mendahului tempohnya yang telah ditentukan, dan mereka juga tidak dapat mengundurkannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ya ayyuha allathee nuzzila AAalayhi alththikru innaka lamajnoonun

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "O thou to whom the Message is being revealed! truly thou art mad (or possessed)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang ingkar berkata (kepada Nabi Muhammad): "Wahai orang yang kepadanya diturunkan Al-Quran, sesungguhnya engkau adalah orang gila".

ayahs.arabic: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law ma tateena bialmalaikati in kunta mina alssadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Why bringest thou not angels to us if it be that thou hast the Truth?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sepatutnya engkau membawakan malaikat kepada kami (untuk menjadi saksi tentang kerasulanmu), jika betul engkau dari orang-orang yang benar!"

ayahs.arabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma nunazzilu almalaikata illa bialhaqqi wama kanoo ithan munthareena

translations.en_sahih: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved.
translations.en_yusufali: We send not the angels down except for just cause: if they came (to the ungodly), behold! no respite would they have!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiadalah Kami menurunkan Malaikat melainkan dengan cara yang sungguh layak dan berhikmat, dan pada ketika itu mereka (yang ingkar) tidak akan diberi tempoh lagi.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَـٰفِظُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nazzalna alththikra wainna lahu lahafithoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian.
translations.en_yusufali: We have, without doubt, sent down the Message; and We will assuredly guard it (from corruption).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kamilah yang menurunkan Al-Quran, dan Kamilah yang memelihara dan menjaganya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad arsalna min qablika fee shiyaAAi alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples.
translations.en_yusufali: We did send messengers before thee amongst the religious sects of old:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah utuskan Rasul-rasul sebelummu (wahai Muhammad), dalam kalangan kaum-kaum yang telah lalu.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona

translations.en_sahih: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.
translations.en_yusufali: But never came a messenger to them but they mocked him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiadalah seseorang Rasul pun yang datang kepada mereka, melainkan mereka mempersenda dan mengejek-ejeknya.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika naslukuhu fee quloobi almujrimeena

translations.en_sahih: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: Even so do we let it creep into the hearts of the sinners -
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sebagaimana hati kaum-kaum yang telah lalu dimasuki perasaan mempersendakan Rasul-rasul) demikianlah pula Kami masukkan perasaan yang seperti itu ke dalam hati orang-orang yang berdosa (yang menentangmu).

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yuminoona bihi waqad khalat sunnatu alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.
translations.en_yusufali: That they should not believe in the (Message); but the ways of the ancients have passed away.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak percaya kepada Al-Quran yang engkau bawa, padahal telahpun berlaku undang-undang membinasakan orang-orang yang telah lalu (yang mendustakan Rasul-rasulnya).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaw fatahna AAalayhim baban mina alssamai fathalloo feehi yaAArujoona

translations.en_sahih: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,
translations.en_yusufali: Even if We opened out to them a gate from heaven, and they were to continue (all day) ascending therein,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kalau Kami bukakan kepada mereka mana-mana pintu langit, kemudian mereka dapat naik melalui pintu itu (pada siang hari yang membolehkan mereka menyaksikan segala kenyataan yang ada):

ayahs.arabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَـٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqaloo innama sukkirat absaruna bal nahnu qawmun mashooroona

translations.en_sahih: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."
translations.en_yusufali: They would only say: "Our eyes have been intoxicated: Nay, we have been bewitched by sorcery."
translations.ms_basmeih: Tentulah mereka akan (mengingkari kenyataan yang benar itu dengan) berkata: "Hanya mata kami telah disilapkan penglihatannya bahkan kami adalah kaum yang telah disihirkan (oleh Muhammad)".

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad jaAAalna fee alssamai buroojan wazayyannaha lilnnathireena

translations.en_sahih: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.
translations.en_yusufali: It is We Who have set out the zodiacal signs in the heavens, and made them fair-seeming to (all) beholders;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah menjadikan di langit: bintang-bintang (yang berbagai bentuk dan keadaan) serta kami hiasi langit itu bagi orang-orang yang melihatnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَفِظْنَـٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahafithnaha min kulli shaytanin rajeemin

translations.en_sahih: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]
translations.en_yusufali: And (moreover) We have guarded them from every cursed devil:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami pelihara (urusan) langit itu dari (masuk campur) tiap-tiap Syaitan yang kena rejam.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa mani istaraqa alssamAAa faatbaAAahu shihabun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.
translations.en_yusufali: But any that gains a hearing by stealth, is pursued by a flaming fire, bright (to see).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali Syaitan yang curi mendengar percakapan (malaikat di langit), maka ia diburu dan diikuti (dengan rejaman) api yang menyala, yang nyata kelihatan.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli shayin mawzoonin

translations.en_sahih: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.
translations.en_yusufali: And the earth We have spread out (like a carpet); set thereon mountains firm and immovable; and produced therein all kinds of things in due balance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi ini Kami bentangkan, dan Kami letakkan padanya gunung-ganang yang kukuh terdiri, serta Kami tumbuhkan padanya tiap-tiap sesuatu yang tertentu timbangannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَـٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna lakum feeha maAAayisha waman lastum lahu biraziqeena

translations.en_sahih: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have provided therein means of subsistence,- for you and for those for whose sustenance ye are not responsible.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan untuk kamu pada bumi ini segala keperluan hidup, juga Kami jadikan makhluk-makhluk yang kamu bukanlah orang yang sebenar menyediakan rezekinya.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain min shayin illa AAindana khazainuhu wama nunazziluhu illa biqadarin maAAloomin

translations.en_sahih: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure.
translations.en_yusufali: And there is not a thing but its (sources and) treasures (inexhaustible) are with Us; but We only send down thereof in due and ascertainable measures.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidak ada sesuatupun melainkan pada sisi Kami sahaja perbendaharaannya dan Kami tidak menurunkannya melainkan dengan menurut kadar dan masa yang tertentu.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَـٰزِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waarsalna alrriyaha lawaqiha faanzalna mina alssamai maan faasqaynakumoohu wama antum lahu bikhazineena

translations.en_sahih: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.
translations.en_yusufali: And We send the fecundating winds, then cause the rain to descend from the sky, therewith providing you with water (in abundance), though ye are not the guardians of its stores.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami hantarkan angin sebagai pembawa air dan pemindah benih; maka dengan itu Kami menurunkan air (hujan) dari langit, kemudian Kami berikan kamu meminumnya; dan bukanlah kamu yang (berkuasa menurunkannya atau) menyimpannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna lanahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wanahnu alwarithoona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily, it is We Who give life, and Who give death: it is We Who remain inheritors (after all else passes away).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kamilah yang menghidupkan dan yang mematikan, dan Kamilah yang kekal memiliki segala-galanya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad AAalimna almustaqdimeena minkum walaqad AAalimna almustakhireena

translations.en_sahih: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].
translations.en_yusufali: To Us are known those of you who hasten forward, and those who lag behind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang segera (berbakti) di antara kamu, dan sesungguhnya Kami telah mengetahui orang-orang yang lambat.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna rabbaka huwa yahshuruhum innahu hakeemun AAaleemun

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: Assuredly it is thy Lord Who will gather them together: for He is perfect in Wisdom and Knowledge.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dia lah yang menghimpunkan mereka semuanya; sesungguhnya Ia Maha Bijaksana, lagi Maha Mengetahui.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana min salsalin min hamain masnoonin

translations.en_sahih: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.
translations.en_yusufali: We created man from sounding clay, from mud moulded into shape;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia (Adam) dari tanah liat yang kering, yang berasal dari tanah kental yang berubah warna dan baunya.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waaljanna khalaqnahu min qablu min nari alssamoomi

translations.en_sahih: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.
translations.en_yusufali: And the Jinn race, We had created before, from the fire of a scorching wind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan jin pula, Kami jadikan dia sebelum itu, dari angin api yang panasnya menyerap ke liang bulu roma.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَـٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min salsalin min hamain masnoonin

translations.en_sahih: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! thy Lord said to the angels: "I am about to create man, from sounding clay from mud moulded into shape;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika Tuhanmu berfirman kepada malaikat: "Sesungguhnya Aku hendak menciptakan manusia dari tanah liat yang kering, yang berasal dari tanah kental yang berubah warna dan baunya.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena

translations.en_sahih: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."
translations.en_yusufali: "When I have fashioned him (in due proportion) and breathed into him of My spirit, fall ye down in obeisance unto him."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian apabila Aku sempurnakan kejadiannya, serta Aku tiupkan padanya roh dari (ciptaan) ku, maka hendaklah kamu sujud kepadanya.

ayahs.arabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
translations.en_yusufali: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah selesai kejadian Adam) maka sujudlah sekalian malaikat, semuanya sekali, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa ibleesa aba an yakoona maAAa alssajideena

translations.en_sahih: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated.
translations.en_yusufali: Not so Iblis: he refused to be among those who prostrated themselves.
translations.ms_basmeih: Melainkan Iblis; ia enggan turut bersama mereka yang sujud.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya ibleesu ma laka alla takoona maAAa alssajideena

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "O Iblis! what is your reason for not being among those who prostrated themselves?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: Hai Iblis, apa sebabnya engkau tidak turut bersama mereka yang sujud itu?".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lam akun liasjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min salsalin min hamain masnoonin

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."
translations.en_yusufali: (Iblis) said: "I am not one to prostrate myself to man, whom Thou didst create from sounding clay, from mud moulded into shape."
translations.ms_basmeih: Iblis menjawab: "Aku tidak patut sujud kepada manusia yang Engkau jadikan dia dari tanah liat yang kering, yang berasal dari tanah kental yang berubah warna dan baunya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled.
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "Then get thee out from here; for thou art rejected, accursed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Kalau demikian, keluarlah engkau daripadanya, kerana sesungguhnya engkau dari sekarang ke masa depan adalah (satu makhluk yang) diusir.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna AAalayka allaAAnata ila yawmi alddeeni

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."
translations.en_yusufali: "And the curse shall be on thee till the day of Judgment."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya engkau ditimpa laknat terus-menerus hingga ke hari kiamat".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
translations.en_yusufali: (Iblis) said: "O my Lord! give me then respite till the Day the (dead) are raised."
translations.ms_basmeih: Iblis berkata:" Wahai Tuhanku! Jika demikian, berilah tempoh kepadaku hingga ke hari mereka dibangitkan (hari kiamat)".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "Respite is granted thee
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Dengan permohonanmu itu, maka sesungguhnya engkau dari golongan yang diberi tempoh.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi

translations.en_sahih: Until the Day of the time well-known."
translations.en_yusufali: "Till the Day of the Time appointed."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Hingga ke hari - masa yang termaklum".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi bima aghwaytanee laozayyinanna lahum fee alardi walaoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all
translations.en_yusufali: (Iblis) said: "O my Lord! because Thou hast put me in the wrong, I will make (wrong) fair-seeming to them on the earth, and I will put them all in the wrong,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Iblis berkata: " Wahai Tuhanku! Kerana Engkau telah menjadikan daku sesat, (maka) demi sesungguhnya aku akan memperelokkan segala jenis maksiat kepada Adam dan zuriatnya di dunia ini, dan aku akan menyesatkan mereka semuanya,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena

translations.en_sahih: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
translations.en_yusufali: "Except Thy servants among them, sincere and purified (by Thy Grace)."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kecuali di antara zuriat-zuriat Adam itu hamba-hambaMu yang dibersihkan dari sebarang syirik".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hatha siratun AAalayya mustaqeemun

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.
translations.en_yusufali: (Allah) said: "This (way of My sincere servants) is indeed a way that leads straight to Me.
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah berfirman: "Inilah satu jalan yang lurus, yang tetap Aku memeliharanya.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna AAibadee laysa laka AAalayhim sultanun illa mani ittabaAAaka mina alghaweena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.
translations.en_yusufali: "For over My servants no authority shalt thou have, except such as put themselves in the wrong and follow thee."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Sesungguhnya hamba-hambaKu, tidaklah ada bagimu sebarang kuasa untuk menyesatkan mereka, kecuali sesiapa yang menurutmu dari orang-orang yang sesat (dengan pilihannya sendiri).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna jahannama lamawAAiduhum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily, Hell is the promised abode for them all!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya neraka Jahannam itu, tempat yang dijanjikan bagi sekalian mereka (yang menurutmu).

ayahs.arabic: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَّقْسُومٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Laha sabAAatu abwabin likulli babin minhum juzon maqsoomun

translations.en_sahih: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated."
translations.en_yusufali: To it are seven gates: for each of those gates is a (special) class (of sinners) assigned.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ia mempunyai tujuh pintu; bagi tiap-tiap sebuah pintu ada bahagian yang tertentu dari mereka (yang sesat dan menyesatkan itu)".

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs.
translations.en_yusufali: The righteous (will be) amid gardens and fountains (of clear-flowing water).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertaqwa adalah ditempatkan di dalam beberapa taman Syurga, dengan matair-matair terpancar padanya.

ayahs.arabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Odkhulooha bisalamin amineena

translations.en_sahih: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."
translations.en_yusufali: (Their greeting will be): "Enter ye here in peace and security."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka dipersilakan oleh malaikat dengan berkata): "Masuklah kamu ke dalamnya dengan selamat sejahtera serta beroleh aman".

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WanazaAAna ma fee sudoorihim min ghillin ikhwanan AAala sururin mutaqabileena

translations.en_sahih: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.
translations.en_yusufali: And We shall remove from their hearts any lurking sense of injury: (they will be) brothers (joyfully) facing each other on thrones (of dignity).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami cabut akan apa yang ada dihati mereka dari perasaan hasad dengki sehingga menjadilah mereka bersaudara (dalam suasana kasih mesra), serta mereka duduk berhadap-hadapan di atas pelamin masing-masing.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yamassuhum feeha nasabun wama hum minha bimukhrajeena

translations.en_sahih: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.
translations.en_yusufali: There no sense of fatigue shall touch them, nor shall they (ever) be asked to leave.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak akan disentuh susah payah dalam Syurga itu, dan mereka pula tidak sekali-kali akan dikeluarkan daripadanya.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Nabbi AAibadee annee ana alghafooru alrraheemu

translations.en_sahih: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: Tell My servants that I am indeed the Oft-forgiving, Most Merciful;
translations.ms_basmeih: Khabarkanlah kepada hamba-hambaKu (wahai Muhammad), bahawa Akulah Yang Maha Pengampun lagi Maha Mengasihani (bagi mereka yang bertaubat dan beramal soleh).

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa anna AAathabee huwa alAAathabu alaleemu

translations.en_sahih: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: And that My Penalty will be indeed the most grievous Penalty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa azabKu, ialah azab yang tidak terperi sakitnya, (bagi mereka yang tetap dalam kederhakaannya).

ayahs.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanabbihum AAan dayfi ibraheema

translations.en_sahih: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
translations.en_yusufali: Tell them about the guests of Abraham.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan khabarkanlah kepada mereka perihal tetamu Nabi Ibrahim.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala inna minkum wajiloona

translations.en_sahih: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you."
translations.en_yusufali: When they entered his presence and said, "Peace!" He said, "We feel afraid of you!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika mereka masuk mendapatkannya lalu memberi salam dengan berkata: "Selamat sejahtera kepadamu!" Ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya kami berasa takut kepada kamu".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la tawjal inna nubashshiruka bighulamin AAaleemin

translations.en_sahih: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Fear not! We give thee glad tidings of a son endowed with wisdom."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Janganlah engkau takut, sebenarnya kami hendak mengembirakanmu dengan berita bahawa engkau akan beroleh seorang anak lelaki yang bakal menjadi seorang yang berilmu".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala abashshartumoonee AAala an massaniya alkibaru fabima tubashshirooni

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Do ye give me glad tidings that old age has seized me? Of what, then, is your good news?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim berkata: "Betulkah kamu mengembirakan daku (dengan berita yang demikian), padahal aku telah tua; maka dengan jalan apakah kamu mengembirakan daku?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِطِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bashsharnaka bialhaqqi fala takun mina alqaniteena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "We give thee glad tidings in truth: be not then in despair!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami mengembirakanmu dengan jalan yang sungguh benar; oleh itu janganlah engkau menjadi dari orang-orang yang berputus asa".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala waman yaqnatu min rahmati rabbihi illa alddalloona

translations.en_sahih: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord, but such as go astray?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim berkata: "Dan tiadalah sesiapa yang berputus asa dari rahmat Tuhannya melainkan orang-orang yang sesat".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fama khatbukum ayyuha almursaloona

translations.en_sahih: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
translations.en_yusufali: Abraham said: "What then is the business on which ye (have come), O ye messengers (of Allah)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim bertanya pula: "Apa hal kamu wahai Utusan Tuhan?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "We have been sent to a people (deep) in sin,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami diutus kepada suatu kaum yang berdosa (untuk membinasakan mereka)".

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa ala lootin inna lamunajjoohum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
translations.en_yusufali: "Excepting the adherents of Lut: them we are certainly (charged) to save (from harm),- All -
translations.ms_basmeih: "Melainkan keluarga Nabi Lut; sesungguhnya kami akan menyelamatkan mereka semuanya, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa imraatahu qaddarna innaha lamina alghabireena

translations.en_sahih: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
translations.en_yusufali: "Except his wife, who, We have ascertained, will be among those who will lag behind."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kecuali isterinya; kami telah tentukan (menurut keputusan Tuhan) sesungguhnya ia dari orang-orang yang tinggal (menerima kebinasaan)".

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma jaa ala lootin almursaloona

translations.en_sahih: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
translations.en_yusufali: At length when the messengers arrived among the adherents of Lut,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apabila (malaikat-malaikat) utusan itu datang kepada kaum Nabi Lut,

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala innakum qawmun munkaroona

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Ye appear to be uncommon folk."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Lut berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu suatu kaum yang tidak dikenali (serta tidak diketahui baiknya kedatangan kamu)".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَـٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo bal jinaka bima kanoo feehi yamtaroona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Yea, we have come to thee to accomplish that of which they doubt.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "(Kedatangan kami bukan untuk mendukacitakanmu) bahkan kami datang kepadamu untuk membawa azab yang mereka ragu-ragukan kebenarannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَتَيْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waataynaka bialhaqqi wainna lasadiqoona

translations.en_sahih: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.
translations.en_yusufali: "We have brought to thee that which is inevitably due, and assuredly we tell the truth.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Juga membawa kepadamu perkara yang benar (tentang kebinasaan mereka); dan sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang benar ".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَـٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faasri biahlika biqitAAin mina allayli waittabiAA adbarahum wala yaltafit minkum ahadun waimdoo haythu tumaroona

translations.en_sahih: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."
translations.en_yusufali: "Then travel by night with thy household, when a portion of the night (yet remains), and do thou bring up the rear: let no one amongst you look back, but pass on whither ye are ordered."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Oleh itu, bawalah pergi keluargamu pada waktu malam serta ikutlah di belakang mereka; dan janganlah seseorang pun di antara kamu berpaling (ke belakang); serta pergilah terus ke arah yang diperintahkan kamu menujunya".

ayahs.arabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqadayna ilayhi thalika alamra anna dabira haolai maqtooAAun musbiheena

translations.en_sahih: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
translations.en_yusufali: And We made known this decree to him, that the last remnants of those (sinners) should be cut off by the morning.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami wahyukan kepadanya tentang kesudahan perkara itu; iaitu mereka akan dibinasakan pada waktu pagi, sehingga mereka punah ranah dan terputus keturunannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaa ahlu almadeenati yastabshiroona

translations.en_sahih: And the people of the city came rejoicing.
translations.en_yusufali: The inhabitants of the city came in (mad) joy (at news of the young men).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (semasa kedatangan mereka) datanglah penduduk bandar itu dengan gembira.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala inna haolai dayfee fala tafdahooni

translations.en_sahih: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
translations.en_yusufali: Lut said: "These are my guests: disgrace me not:
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Lut berkata: "Sesungguhnya mereka ini tetamuku, maka janganlah kamu memberi malu kepadaku".

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waittaqoo Allaha wala tukhzooni

translations.en_sahih: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me."
translations.en_yusufali: "But fear Allah, and shame me not."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan takutlah kamu kepada Allah serta janganlah kamu menghinakan daku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo awalam nanhaka AAani alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Did we not forbid thee (to speak) for all and sundry?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Bukankah kami telah melarangmu jangan menerima sebarang tetamu dari orang ramai (atau memberi perlindungan kepada mereka)?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala haolai banatee in kuntum faAAileena

translations.en_sahih: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "There are my daughters (to marry), if ye must act (so)."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Lut berkata: "Di sini ada anak-anak perempuanku, kalaulah kamu mahu melakukan (secara halal).

ayahs.arabic: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAamruka innahum lafee sakratihim yaAAmahoona

translations.en_sahih: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, by thy life (O Prophet), in their wild intoxication, they wander in distraction, to and fro.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi umurmu (wahai Muhammad), sesungguhnya mereka membuta tuli dalam kemabukan maksiat mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu mushriqeena

translations.en_sahih: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.
translations.en_yusufali: But the (mighty) Blast overtook them before morning,
translations.ms_basmeih: Akhirnya merekapun dibinasakan oleh letusan suara yang menggempakan bumi, ketika matahari terbit.

ayahs.arabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عَـٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
ayahs.transliteration: FajaAAalna AAaliyaha safilaha waamtarna AAalayhim hijaratan min sijjeelin

translations.en_sahih: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.
translations.en_yusufali: And We turned (the cities) upside down, and rained down on them brimstones hard as baked clay.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami jadikan negeri kaum Lut itu tunggang-balik (tertimbus segala yang ada di muka buminya), dan kami hujani atasnya dengan batu dari tanah yang dibakar.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatin lilmutawassimeena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! in this are Signs for those who by tokens do understand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya balasan azab yang demikian itu, mengandungi tanda-tanda bagi orang-orang yang kenalkan sesuatu serta memerhati dan memikirkannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnaha labisabeelin muqeemin

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road.
translations.en_yusufali: And the (cities were) right on the high-road.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya negeri kaum Lut yang telah dibinasakan itu, terletak di jalan yang tetap (dilalui orang).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan lilmumineena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! in this is a sign for those who believed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya keadaan yang demikian, mengandungi satu tanda yang memberi kesedaran kepada orang-orang yang beriman.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain kana ashabu alaykati lathalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers.
translations.en_yusufali: And the Companions of the Wood were also wrong-doers;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebenarnya penduduk kampung "Aikah" adalah orang-orang yang berlaku zalim.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faintaqamna minhum wainnahuma labiimamin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.
translations.en_yusufali: So We exacted retribution from them. They were both on an open highway, plain to see.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami membalas kezaliman mereka itu dengan azab yang membinasakan; dan sesungguhnya kedua-duanya itu terletak di jalan yang terang (yang masih dilalui orang).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad kaththaba ashabu alhijri almursaleena

translations.en_sahih: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers.
translations.en_yusufali: The Companions of the Rocky Tract also rejected the messengers:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya penduduk "Al-Hijr" telah mendustakan Rasul-rasul.

ayahs.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waataynahum ayatina fakanoo AAanha muAArideena

translations.en_sahih: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: We sent them Our Signs, but they persisted in turning away from them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah berikan kepada mereka tanda-tanda (yang membuktikan kebenaran ugama dan Rasul Kami); dalam pada itu, mereka terus juga berpaling (mengingkarinya).

ayahs.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakanoo yanhitoona mina aljibali buyootan amineena

translations.en_sahih: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.
translations.en_yusufali: Out of the mountains did they hew (their) edifices, (feeling themselves) secure.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka memahat sebahagian dari gunung-ganang, sebagai tempat tinggal dengan keadaan aman (dari sesuatu bahaya).

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathathumu alssayhatu musbiheena

translations.en_sahih: But the shriek seized them at early morning.
translations.en_yusufali: But the (mighty) Blast seized them of a morning,
translations.ms_basmeih: Meskipun demikian, mereka dibinasakan juga oleh letusan suara yang menggempakan pada bumi waktu pagi.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yaksiboona

translations.en_sahih: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.
translations.en_yusufali: And of no avail to them was all that they did (with such art and care)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apa yang mereka telah usahakan itu, tidak dapat menolong mereka sedikit pun.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَـَٔاتِيَةٌ ۖ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma illa bialhaqqi wainna alssaAAata laatiyatun faisfahi alssafha aljameela

translations.en_sahih: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
translations.en_yusufali: We created not the heavens, the earth, and all between them, but for just ends. And the Hour is surely coming (when this will be manifest). So overlook (any human faults) with gracious forgiveness.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatlah) tiadalah Kami mencipta langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya itu, melainkan dengan cara yang sungguh layak dan berhikmat; dan sesungguhnya hari kiamat itu tetap akan datang; oleh itu biarkanlah (golongan kafir yang mendustakanmu itu wahai Muhammad) serta layanlah mereka dengan cara yang elok.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna rabbaka huwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.
translations.en_yusufali: For verily it is thy Lord who is the Master-Creator, knowing all things.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu, Dia lah yang menciptakan sekalian makhluk, lagi Yang Maha Mengetahui (akan hal mereka).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad ataynaka sabAAan mina almathanee waalqurana alAAatheema

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have bestowed upon thee the Seven Oft-repeated (verses) and the Grand Qur'an.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) tujuh ayat yang diulang-ulang bacaannya dan seluruh Al-Quran yang amat besar kemuliaan dan faedahnya.

ayahs.arabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum wala tahzan AAalayhim waikhfid janahaka lilmumineena

translations.en_sahih: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers
translations.en_yusufali: Strain not thine eyes. (Wistfully) at what We have bestowed on certain classes of them, nor grieve over them: but lower thy wing (in gentleness) to the believers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Janganlah engkau menujukan pandanganmu (serta menaruh hati) kepada nikmat kesenangan yang kami berikan kepada beberapa golongan di antara mereka (yang kafir itu) dan janganlah engkau merasa dukacita terhadap mereka (kerana mereka tidak beriman dan tidak dapat menguatkan Islam sebagaimana yang engkau harapkan); dan sebaliknya hendaklah engkau merendah diri kepada orang-orang yang beriman (sekalipun mereka dari golongan fakir miskin).

ayahs.arabic: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqul innee ana alnnatheeru almubeenu

translations.en_sahih: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -
translations.en_yusufali: And say: "I am indeed he that warneth openly and without ambiguity,"-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya aku ini, adalah seorang Rasul pemberi amaran dengan bukti-bukti yang nyata (tentang turunnya azab ke atas orang-orang yang ingkar)".

ayahs.arabic: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kama anzalna AAala almuqtasimeena

translations.en_sahih: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
translations.en_yusufali: (Of just such wrath) as We sent down on those who divided (Scripture into arbitrary parts),-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kami berikan kepadamu Al-Faatihah dan Al-Quran) samalah seperti Kami menurunkan (Kitab-kitab) kepada orang-orang yang membahagi-bahagi. -

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena jaAAaloo alqurana AAideena

translations.en_sahih: Who have made the Qur'an into portions.
translations.en_yusufali: (So also on such) as have made Qur'an into shreds (as they please).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) mereka yang menjadikan Al-Quran terbahagi kepada beberapa bahagian (lalu mereka percaya kepada sebahagian dan menolak sebahagian yang lain).

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawarabbika lanasalannahum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore, by the Lord, We will, of a surety, call them to account,
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi Tuhanmu! Kami akan menyoal mereka (yang kafir itu) semuanya (pada hari kiamat kelak), -

ayahs.arabic: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAamma kanoo yaAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: About what they used to do.
translations.en_yusufali: For all their deeds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mengenai apa yang mereka telah lakukan.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: FaisdaAA bima tumaru waaAArid AAani almushrikeena

translations.en_sahih: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore expound openly what thou art commanded, and turn away from those who join false gods with Allah.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, sampaikanlah secara berterus-terang apa yang diperintahkan kepadamu (wahai Muhammad), dan janganlah engkau hiraukan bantahan dan tentangan kaum kafir musyrik itu.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna kafaynaka almustahzieena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
translations.en_yusufali: For sufficient are We unto thee against those who scoff,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami tetap memelihara dan mengawalmu dari kejahatan orang-orang yang mengejek-ejek dan mempersendakanmu, -

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yajAAaloona maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fasawfa yaAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know.
translations.en_yusufali: Those who adopt, with Allah, another god: but soon will they come to know.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) mereka yang mengadakan tuhan yang lain bersama-sama Allah, maka mereka akan mengetahui kelak (akibatnya).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad naAAlamu annaka yadeequ sadruka bima yaqooloona

translations.en_sahih: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.
translations.en_yusufali: We do indeed know how thy heart is distressed at what they say.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya Kami mengetahui, bahawa engkau bersusah hati dengan sebab apa yang mereka katakan.

ayahs.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wakun mina alssajideena

translations.en_sahih: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
translations.en_yusufali: But celebrate the praises of thy Lord, and be of those who prostrate themselves in adoration.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, bertasbihlah engkau dengan memuji Tuhanmu, serta jadilah dari orang-orang yang sujud.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: WaoAAbud rabbaka hatta yatiyaka alyaqeenu

translations.en_sahih: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death).
translations.en_yusufali: And serve thy Lord until there come unto thee the Hour that is Certain.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sembahlah Tuhanmu, sehingga datang kepadamu (perkara yang tetap) yakin.
